calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-14-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Petitioner. Sheila Robello Court appointed Counsel for Geroge Schiffers. Philip Campbell in Propria Persona.

Mr. Ferdon stated that part of the delay was trying to get an accounting from the Conservator for the Wells Fargo account, that he has provided the Court with all the information he has, that Mr. Campbell should look to his Client for reimbursement and that the Public Administrator had to file their own petitions. Ms. Robello stated that her Clients concerns are that he is living on his pension of $2,500.00 a month, that he has 24 hour caregivers and that it is important to him to get his distribution. Mr. Campbell explained how it was a benefit to the estate by him starting the proceeding. Ms. Robello also stated that the conservatorship has terminated, that a final account has already been filed and asked that the order be amended to make distribution to George Schiffers as an individual. The accounting petition was taken under submission. Mr. Ferdon will submit a revised order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Of The Estate
Off Calendar Sep-02-2014 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jul-15-2014 Continued To Sep-02-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathon Ferdon for Public Administrator.

Mr. Ferdon stated that he has a draft of the petition for final account prepared and will be ready for filing, that it was difficult to obtain date of death values, that he agreed to asking for fees for the attorney for the conservator in this petition and that he thinks he can get the petition filed in the next couple of weeks. The court informed counsel that fees for the conservator should be petitioned in the conservatorship matter. Status of closing of the estate was continued to September 2, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joel Blackman made a special appearance for Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Administrator. Teresa Green for Brian Thompson.

The Court appointed the Public Administrator on Mr. Thompson's petition. Mr. Blackman is to submit an order.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
